diagrams.title: Chen Notation ER Diagram Basic Symbols
diagrams.description: Standard symbols used in Chen's Entity-Relationship notation
diagrams.purpose: Learn the fundamental building blocks of ER modeling and recognize symbols in exam diagrams

diagrams.title: Cardinality Notations Comparison
diagrams.description: Comparison of Chen notation vs Crow's foot notation for cardinality ratios
diagrams.purpose: Understand different notations for showing relationship cardinality in ER diagrams

diagrams.title: Weak Entity Example - Hospital System
diagrams.description: ER diagram showing strong and weak entity relationship
elements: Identifying Relationship: Has (connects Patient to Record)
Double line shows total participation of Record
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how weak entities depend on strong entities and use double-line notation

diagrams.title: Ternary Relationship Example
elements: Shows how 3 entities relate with one relationship
diagrams.purpose: Understand ternary (3-entity) relationships and their representation

diagrams.title: Recursive Relationship Example
elements: Self-referencing relationship shown by line looping back
diagrams.purpose: Learn how entities relate to themselves using different roles
